raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"The vague delegation to 'check' the artifact, which describes a protocol and its logic, centrally expects verification of the argument chain's logical consistency.","R1.3":"Checking the artifact involves centrally assessing whether the reported experimental results align with the performance claims made.","R1.4":"The delegation implies a central need to estimate the novelty of QuorumLite compared to mentioned baselines like Raft and Multi-Paxos.","R1.6":"A general check of the research writing draft centrally includes polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in any research draft review to ensure transparent reporting of limitations in the protocol and evaluation.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to validate that performance improvements and contributions are not exaggerated in the artifact.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to confirm the artifact stays within its stated focus on protocol description and evaluation without unrelated digressions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to identify any potential risks in deploying the described replication protocol in critical systems.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are load-bearing to ensure the artifact's content, including protocol design and results, can be properly attributed and verified."}}

rationale.R1.2: The vague delegation to 'check' the artifact, which describes a protocol and its logic, centrally expects verification of the argument chain's logical consistency.
rationale.R1.3: Checking the artifact involves centrally assessing whether the reported experimental results align with the performance claims made.
rationale.R1.4: The delegation implies a central need to estimate the novelty of QuorumLite compared to mentioned baselines like Raft and Multi-Paxos.
rationale.R1.6: A general check of the research writing draft centrally includes polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in any research draft review to ensure transparent reporting of limitations in the protocol and evaluation.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to validate that performance improvements and contributions are not exaggerated in the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to confirm the artifact stays within its stated focus on protocol description and evaluation without unrelated digressions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to identify any potential risks in deploying the described replication protocol in critical systems.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are load-bearing to ensure the artifact's content, including protocol design and results, can be properly attributed and verified.
